scene_imagination: single string; verb-led scratchpad (focus:, define:, refine:, visualize:, analyze:); ~6-12 prompts; under ~250 words
temporal_caption: single sentence describing the temporal arc of the clip
audio_description: audio cues / soundscape for the clip

subjects.description: full visual description of the subject (appearance, clothing, identifying features)
subjects.relationship: how this subject relates to others or to the scene
subjects.relative_size: size within frame (e.g., 'Small within frame', 'Medium within frame', 'Large within frame')
subjects.orientation: direction subject faces relative to camera
subjects.state_changes: how pose or action changes; 'No significant change.' if static
subjects.clothing: clothing and accessories; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.expression: facial expression; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.facial_features: notable facial features; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.number_of_subjects: int; total in this subject's group; 0 if N/A

background_setting: the setting / environment in which the scene takes place

lighting.conditions: overall lighting conditions (e.g., 'natural daylight', 'dim warm interior')
lighting.illumination_effect: any notable illumination effect (e.g., 'rim-light', 'god rays', 'lens flare')

cinematography.focus: what is in focus (e.g., 'subject in foreground; background bokeh')

style_medium: rendering style and medium (e.g., 'photoreal live-action', 'cel-shaded animation')
artistic_style: broader artistic style if applicable (e.g., 'noir', 'pastoral painterly')

actions.time: M:SS-M:SS time range (e.g., '0:00-0:03'); end MUST be <= duration
actions.description: what happens during this time range

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: how the text appears (font style, color, size)
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: where and when in the clip the text appears
text_and_signage_elements.context: narrative or situational context for the text

segments.time_range: M:SS-M:SS time range; end MUST be <= duration
segments.key_changes: key state/scene changes within this segment

transitions: transition descriptions between segments; [] if single continuous shot
